user.title: Configure your bpost account
user.description: Fill in the credentials for your bpost account. The integration signs in through the same bpost account page used by Mijn bpost.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication
reauth_confirm.description: Your bpost session has expired. Enter your bpost password to sign in again.

error.cannot_connect: The connection to bpost failed. Please verify that Home Assistant is connected to the internet.
error.invalid_auth: The account does not exist or the password is incorrect.
error.invalid_login: Enter both an email address and password.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This account has already been configured.
